thinks.think: A logo animation plays on a black background. Initially, 'sarah's' is visible in white above a distorted, fading 'vegan kitchen.' The graphic resolves into a clean layout: 'sarah's' in solid white sans-serif font above a horizontal line, followed by 'vegan kitchen' in a thin, outlined typeface, with a second horizontal line underneath.

The scene transitions from the logo to a close-up of a burger on a white plate with a dark rim. The burger has a brown bun topped with sesame and poppy seeds, a dark patty, a slice of yellow cheese, and a large piece of pale green lettuce. It sits on a textured, woven brown surface.

The scene remains a static close-up of the burger resting on a white plate with a dark rim. The burger features a brown bun topped with sesame and poppy seeds, a dark patty, a slice of yellow cheese, and a large piece of pale green lettuce. It sits on a textured, woven brown surface.

The scene cuts to a close-up of chopped raw ingredients piled together in a container. Visible sections include diced red bell peppers on the left, minced garlic in the upper center, chopped green celery at the bottom, and diced white onions on the right.

The scene shifts to a wooden cutting board where green celery is being diced. A knife blade is visible in the upper right, chopping the vegetable into small cubes. A hand is partially seen holding the celery steady. The diced pieces are scattered across the wooden surface.

A knife blade continues dicing green celery on a wooden cutting board. A hand holds the stalks steady on the left. The blade slices the vegetable into small cubes, adding to the central pile of diced celery scattered across the textured wood surface.

The knife blade continues to chop the green celery into small cubes on the wooden cutting board. A hand becomes visible on the right side, moving near the pile of diced vegetables as the chopping action persists.

The view changes to slicing red bell peppers on the wooden cutting board. A hand holds a strip of red pepper steady while a large knife blade cuts through it lengthwise. Additional strips of red pepper are visible in the background on the wood surface.

A hand stabilizes a strip of red bell pepper on a wooden cutting board as a large, rectangular knife blade slices through it lengthwise. Several other red pepper strips rest in the background on the wood. The blade continues its downward motion to cut the vegetable.

A hand holds a red bell pepper strip steady on a wooden cutting board while a large knife blade slices through it lengthwise. Several other red pepper strips rest in the background as the blade continues its downward cutting motion to prepare the vegetable.

A hand holds red bell pepper strips on a wooden cutting board while a large knife chops them into small pieces. The blade moves rapidly back and forth, dicing the red vegetable into cubes. The chopped pieces accumulate on the board as the cutting continues.

A large pile of diced red bell peppers rests on a wooden cutting board, occupying the left and center of the frame. The small, uniform red cubes are scattered across the wood surface. The knife blade is partially visible at the top right edge, hovering near the completed mound of chopped vegetables.

A hand with manicured nails holds a peeled white onion steady on a wooden cutting board. A large metal knife slices horizontally through the onion, separating thin layers. Scattered red pepper pieces lie on the board near the white vegetable. The blade continues its cutting motion through the onion.

A hand secures a white onion on a wooden cutting board as a large knife dices it into small cubes. The blade chops through the vegetable, accumulating white pieces on the surface. Scattered red pepper fragments lie nearby on the board from previous preparation.

A hand secures a white onion on a wooden cutting board as a large metal knife continues to dice it into small, uniform cubes. The blade chops rhythmically, increasing the pile of white vegetable pieces mixed with scattered red pepper fragments on the wood surface.

A metal box grater sits on a wooden cutting board. A hand moves rapidly against the side, shredding a green vegetable. Small green strips and white chunks lie scattered on the wood near the base of the grater as the action continues.

A metal box grater stands on a wooden cutting board while a hand rapidly shreds a green vegetable. A large pile of thin, pale green strips accumulates beneath the grater, significantly increasing the volume of shredded pieces on the surface.

A substantial pile of shredded green vegetable, featuring thin pale strips with dark green skin edges, dominates the wooden cutting board. The camera focuses on the accumulated mound of ingredients, highlighting the texture and volume created by the grating process.

The static shot maintains focus on a large mound of shredded green vegetable resting on the wooden cutting board. The pile comprises thin, pale strips with dark green skin edges, showing no significant movement or change in arrangement. The camera highlights the texture and volume of the prepared ingredient without new action.

A close-up view captures a hand gripping a large metal knife, actively slicing through several pale yellow garlic cloves arranged on a wooden cutting board. The blade presses down, creating small, irregular white chunks that scatter near the foreground while whole cloves remain in the background.

A metal knife with visible indentations continues slicing through pale garlic cloves on a wooden cutting board. Fingers stabilize the ingredients as the blade creates thin, white segments, adding to the small pile of minced pieces in the foreground. The camera maintains a close-up view of the cutting action.

A hand guides a large metal knife to slice through pale garlic cloves on a wooden board. Thin, white segments accumulate in a messy pile as the blade cuts through the remaining whole cloves held steady by fingers in the background, continuing the chopping process.

A hand rapidly maneuvers a large metal knife in a rocking motion over pale garlic cloves on a wooden board. The blade chops quickly, breaking the sliced segments into smaller, minced pieces. The fast movement creates a blur around the hand and knife as the pile of garlic becomes finer and more scattered.

The rapid chopping of pale garlic cloves on a wooden board concludes. The scene cuts to a close-up of a small, clear glass bowl resting on the wood surface. Inside the bowl sits a mound of coarse, brown granular powder. A hand is visible holding the rim of the bowl steady.

A clear liquid pours from a glass vessel into the small bowl holding the brown granular powder. The stream impacts the dry mixture, beginning to saturate the grains and form a wet, slurry-like consistency at the bottom of the glass container.

A silver metal spoon enters the small clear glass bowl and vigorously stirs the wet brown mixture. The utensil blends the clear liquid and granular powder together, transforming the separate ingredients into a thicker, cohesive slurry as it rotates rapidly on the light brown wooden surface.

A silver spoon mixes a thick, brownish-grey liquid with visible specks inside a small clear glass bowl. The stirring motion blends the ingredients into a uniform slurry resting on the wooden surface. The mixture appears wet and consistent in texture.

A silver spoon lifts a portion of the thick, brownish-grey mixture from the small glass bowl. The substance clings to the utensil, revealing a gelatinous, viscous texture with visible specks as it drips slowly back into the container, indicating the mixture has thickened significantly.

A silver spoon holds a large, thick dollop of the brownish-grey mixture above the clear glass bowl. The substance appears dense and gelatinous with visible specks, maintaining its shape on the utensil rather than dripping, while the bowl rests on a wooden surface.

A silver spoon stirs a thick, brownish-grey mixture with visible specks inside a small clear glass bowl. The substance has a gelatinous, wet consistency as the utensil blends it against the bottom of the container resting on a light brown wooden surface.

A silver spoon rests motionless inside a small clear glass bowl containing a thick, brownish-grey speckled mixture. The bowl sits stationary on a light brown wooden surface, displaying the prepared wet slurry in a static state after the previous mixing action has ceased.

A metal measuring cup filled to the brim with dry, pale beige rolled oats is presented in a static close-up. The utensil sits on a light brown wooden cutting board, highlighting the flaky texture and volume of the uncooked grains piled inside the dark container.

The view shifts from the oats to a clear glass bowl filled with dark red kidney beans. The beans are piled high, appearing shiny and smooth under the lighting. They rest on the wooden surface, filling the frame with their deep maroon color and uniform, curved shapes.

The camera maintains a steady, close-up shot of the clear glass bowl filled with glossy, dark red kidney beans. The beans are piled high, reflecting light on their smooth, curved surfaces, and remain stationary on the light brown wooden cutting board. No new ingredients are added, and the scene holds on this static display of the legumes.

The camera maintains a close-up on the clear glass bowl filled with shiny, dark red kidney beans. The view slowly zooms in tighter on the pile of legumes, emphasizing their smooth, glossy texture and deep maroon color. The beans remain stationary on the wooden surface, filling the frame with their uniform, curved shapes.

The camera maintains a tight close-up on the pile of shiny, dark red kidney beans. The legumes fill the entire frame, showcasing their smooth, glossy texture and deep maroon color. No movement or new ingredients appear as the shot holds steady on the stationary beans resting in the glass bowl.

A close-up shot presents a mound of cooked white rice. The fluffy, individual grains are piled together, filling the frame with their bright white color and soft texture. The lighting emphasizes the separation of the grains, showcasing the prepared starch ingredient.

The camera holds a steady close-up on a pile of cooked white rice. The fluffy grains fill the frame, appearing bright white with distinct separation. The lighting accentuates the soft texture of the starch. No new ingredients or actions occur, as the shot continues to showcase the prepared rice in a static display.

A dark frying pan fills the frame, containing a mixture of diced vegetables being sautéed. Chopped green zucchini, red bell pepper pieces, and white onions are visible, appearing soft and cooked. A red utensil is partially seen on the left edge, suggesting stirring action within the pan.

A red spatula stirs a mixture of diced green zucchini, red peppers, and white onions in a dark pan. The vegetables appear soft and are being sautéed together. The camera remains focused on the cooking ingredients as they are moved around the pan surface.

A red spatula pushes a mixture of diced green zucchini, red peppers, and white onions across a dark frying pan. The vegetables appear soft and are being sautéed as the utensil moves through the pile, blending the ingredients on the cooking surface.

A red spatula stirs a mixture of diced green zucchini, red peppers, and white onions in a dark pan. The vegetables appear soft and cooked, glistening slightly as they are moved around the surface. The camera focuses closely on the texture of the sautéed ingredients.

A silver utensil appears on the left side of the dark pan, joining the red spatula to mix the sautéed vegetables. The pile of diced green zucchini, red peppers, and white onions is stirred, showing a soft, cooked texture with glistening surfaces as the tools move through the ingredients.

The scene cuts to a clear glass bowl filled with cooked dark red beans on a textured beige surface. A hand uses a silver fork to press into the pile of shiny beans, beginning to mash them. The soft legumes are crushed within the bowl as the utensil moves through the mixture.

A hand uses a silver fork to vigorously mash dark red beans within a clear glass bowl resting on a beige mat. The utensil crushes the shiny legumes, breaking them down from whole shapes into a rough, chunky paste as the hand moves rhythmically.

A hand uses a silver fork to mash dark red beans in a clear glass bowl. The utensil crushes the shiny legumes, breaking them into a chunky paste. The motion transforms whole beans into a rough mixture of skins and soft interiors on the textured beige surface.

A hand uses a silver fork to mash dark red beans inside a clear glass bowl resting on a textured beige surface. The utensil crushes the shiny legumes, breaking them down from whole shapes into a rough, chunky paste as the hand moves rhythmically through the mixture.

Inside a clear glass bowl on a beige mat, a hand uses a silver fork to vigorously mash cooked dark red beans. The utensil crushes the shiny legumes, breaking them down from whole shapes into a rough, chunky paste of skins and soft interiors as the rhythmic mashing action continues.

A silver fork rests in the mashed beans as a red spatula transfers the sautéed mixture of diced green zucchini, red peppers, and onions from a pan into the clear glass bowl. The colorful vegetables pile onto the dark bean paste, covering the mashed legumes.

A red spatula scrapes sautéed diced green zucchini, red peppers, and white onions from a black pan into a clear glass bowl containing mashed dark red beans. The colorful vegetable mixture piles onto the bean paste as the transfer from the pan continues.

A red spatula scrapes the remaining sautéed mixture of diced green zucchini, red peppers, and white onions from a black pan into a clear glass bowl containing mashed dark red beans. The colorful vegetables accumulate on top of the bean paste as the pan is emptied.

The red spatula finishes scraping the sautéed vegetable mixture into the glass bowl with the mashed beans. Then, a fine bright red spice powder is sprinkled over the top of the combined vegetables and beans, creating a colorful layer on the mixture.

The scene cuts to a close-up of a hand holding a glass spice jar labeled "Trader Joe's Spices of the World Smoked Paprika." The black label features white text and a red box highlighting the spice name against a blurred wooden background.

A hand holds a glass spice jar with a black label reading "Trader Joe's Spices of the World Smoked Paprika." The scene transitions to a different jar with a green label reading "Trader Joe's Product of Vietnam Black Peppercorns with Grinder," held against a blurred wooden background.

A hand holds a grinder labeled "Black Peppercorns" and grinds fresh pepper over a glass bowl containing mashed dark beans, sautéed diced vegetables, and red spice powder. Small black specks fall onto the colorful mixture as the grinder is twisted.

A large volume of dry, pale beige rolled oats is dumped into the glass bowl, landing on top of the seasoned bean and vegetable mixture. The flakes accumulate in a thick, textured layer, largely covering the red spices, black pepper, and sautéed ingredients below within the container.

A hand places clumps of white rice into the bowl, then uses a silver fork to vigorously mix the rice with the mashed beans, vegetables, and oats. The ingredients are stirred together, forming a cohesive, chunky, and textured mass within the clear glass container.

A hand manually mixes the combined ingredients of mashed beans, sautéed vegetables, oats, and white rice inside a clear glass bowl. The fingers press and fold the sticky, textured mass to blend everything together, while a silver fork rests at the bottom of the container.

summary.text: [0-2] A logo animation on a black background resolves from distorted text to 'sarah's' in white sans-serif font above a horizontal line and 'vegan kitchen' in a thin outlined typeface below. [2-6] A static close-up displays a burger on a white plate with a dark rim, featuring a brown bun topped with sesame and poppy seeds, a dark patty, a slice of yellow cheese, and a large piece of pale green lettuce on a textured brown surface. [6-8] The scene cuts to a close-up of chopped raw ingredients piled together: diced red bell peppers on the left, minced garlic in the upper center, chopped green celery at the bottom, and diced white onions on the right. [8-14] On a wooden cutting board, a knife blade dices green celery into small cubes while a hand holds the stalks steady. [14-16] The view changes to slicing red bell peppers, where a hand holds a strip steady while a large knife cuts through it lengthwise on the wood surface.

[16-24] A hand stabilizes strips of red bell pepper on a wooden cutting board as a large, rectangular knife blade slices through them lengthwise. The blade moves rapidly to chop the vegetable into small, uniform cubes, accumulating a large pile of diced red peppers on the left side of the frame. [24-30] Next, a hand with manicured nails holds a peeled white onion steady while the knife slices it horizontally and then dices it into small white cubes. These white pieces mix with scattered red pepper fragments remaining on the board. [30-32] Finally, a metal box grater sits on the wood as a hand rapidly shreds a green vegetable against the side, producing small green strips and white chunks near the grater's black base.

[32-38] A metal box grater stands on a wooden cutting board while a hand rapidly shreds a green vegetable, causing a large pile of thin, pale green strips with dark green skin edges to accumulate beneath it. The camera focuses on this substantial mound, emphasizing the texture and volume of the shredded ingredient as the grating concludes. [38-46] Attention shifts to garlic preparation on the same wooden board. A hand wields a large metal knife, slicing through several pale yellow garlic cloves to form thin white segments. The process accelerates as the knife moves in a rapid rocking motion, chopping the garlic into a fine, scattered pile of minced white pieces.

After chopping pale garlic cloves on a wooden board, the focus moves to a small clear glass bowl holding coarse brown granular powder. Clear liquid is poured into the bowl, beginning to saturate the grains. A silver spoon enters to vigorously stir the mixture, blending the liquid and powder into a cohesive, wet slurry. The stirring continues until the brownish-grey substance thickens into a gelatinous consistency with visible specks. The spoon lifts a portion to demonstrate the viscous, dense texture before resuming mixing. Finally, the spoon rests motionless in the bowl, displaying the thick, prepared mixture on the wooden surface.

[62-64] A metal measuring cup filled with dry, pale beige rolled oats is presented on a wooden cutting board. [64-72] The view shifts to a clear glass bowl filled with dark red kidney beans; the camera maintains a steady close-up, slowly zooming in on the shiny, smooth legumes piled high on the surface. [72-76] The shot changes to a mound of cooked white rice, where fluffy, bright white grains fill the frame, highlighting the soft texture of the prepared starch.

[76-86] A dark frying pan contains a mixture of diced green zucchini, red bell peppers, and white onions being sautéed. The vegetables appear soft and glistening. A red spatula stirs the ingredients, pushing them across the pan. A silver utensil appears on the left to assist in mixing the cooked vegetable pile. [86-92] The scene shifts to a clear glass bowl on a beige textured mat filled with cooked dark red beans. A hand uses a silver fork to vigorously mash the shiny legumes. The utensil crushes the beans from whole shapes into a rough, chunky paste of skins and soft interiors.

From 92s to 96s, a hand uses a silver fork to mash dark red beans into a chunky paste inside a clear glass bowl. Between 96s and 102s, a red spatula transfers a sautéed mixture of diced green zucchini, red peppers, and white onions from a black pan into the bowl. At 102s, a fine bright red spice powder is sprinkled over the combined ingredients. The video then shows close-ups of spice jars: first, a jar labeled "TRADER JOE'S Spices of the World Smoked Paprika" (104s-106s), followed by a jar labeled "TRADER JOE'S PRODUCT OF VIETNAM BLACK PEPPERCORNS WITH GRINDER" (106s-108s).

[108-110] A hand grinds a "TRADER JOE'S" "BLACK PEPPERCORNS" container ("PRODUCT OF VIETNAM", "WITH GRINDER", "NET WT. 1.8 OZ (51g)") over a glass bowl holding mashed dark beans, sautéed diced vegetables, and red spice powder, adding black specks. [110-114] A large volume of dry pale beige rolled oats is dumped on top, followed by clumps of fluffy cooked white rice. [114-118] A silver utensil vigorously mixes the rice, oats, spices, and bean mixture, then hands manually fold the sticky, textured mass to blend ingredients. [118-122] A hand gathers a large portion of the chunky mix, pressing and compacting it into a cohesive round ball/patty that displays dark beans, white rice, oats, and red peppers.

[122-124] A hand compresses a mixture of dark beans, white rice, and red vegetables into a cohesive ball above a glass bowl containing remaining ingredients and a silver fork. [124-126] The view shifts to a beige silicone baking mat with a red border on a metal sheet, displaying vertical text "SILPAT Made in France". [126-136] A metal scoop deposits four separate portions of the chunky bean, rice, and vegetable blend onto the textured surface: the first mound is placed near the top edge, the second to the left of the first, the third on the bottom right, and the fourth on the bottom left area. [136-138] Four distinct mounds of the textured food mixture rest arranged across the mat.

[138-140] Four textured mounds of bean, rice, and vegetable mixture sit on a beige silicone baking mat with a small crumb in the center. [140-148] A hand presses down on the upper-left mound, flattening it into a patty. [148-154] The hand moves to the upper-right mound, compressing it into a flat patty, while the two lower mounds remain round and untouched.

A hand presses and shapes mounds of textured bean and rice mixture on a beige silicone mat with red borders. Initially, the hand flattens the upper-right mound into a patty while an upper-left patty sits nearby and two lower mounds remain round. The focus shifts to the upper-left mound; the hand presses it with spread fingers, smoothing the edges to form a flat disc. The fingers ensure even thickness on the surface. Throughout, the upper-right patty remains flat, and the two lower mounds stay round and untouched.

[168-170] Scene continues without notable changes. [170-172] A clear glass bowl of pale green iceberg lettuce sits beside a bottle of Annie's Naturals Organic Ketchup with a red label. [172-174] Five thick slices of ripe red tomato with juicy interiors rest on a white plate, near a yellow pickle jar and cucumber slices. [174-176] Thin red onion slices showing purple and white rings are arranged on a white plate next to green cucumbers. [176-178] Focus shifts to round green cucumber slices on a plate, with onion and tomato plates visible on a dark textured brown woven placemat. [178-182] Four sections of sliced avocado are fanned on a white plate, displaying a gradient from pale yellow to deep green, remaining static.

[6-8] The scene cuts to a close-up of chopped raw ingredients piled together: diced red bell peppers on the left, minced garlic in the upper center, chopped green celery at the bottom, and diced white onions on the right. [8-14] On a wooden cutting board, a knife blade dices green celery into small cubes while a hand holds the stalks steady. [14-16] The view changes to slicing red bell peppers, where a hand holds a strip steady while a large knife cuts through it lengthwise on the wood surface.

[16-24] A hand stabilizes strips of red bell pepper on a wooden cutting board as a large, rectangular knife blade slices through them lengthwise. The blade moves rapidly to chop the vegetable into small, uniform cubes, accumulating a large pile of diced red peppers on the left side of the frame. [24-30] Next, a hand with manicured nails holds a peeled white onion steady while the knife slices it horizontally and then dices it into small white cubes. These white pieces mix with scattered red pepper fragments remaining on the board. [30-32] Finally, a metal box grater sits on the wood as a hand rapidly shreds a green vegetable against the side, producing small green strips and white chunks near the grater's black base.

recent_thinks.text: A metal box grater stands on a wooden cutting board while a hand rapidly shreds a green vegetable. A large pile of thin, pale green strips accumulates beneath the grater, significantly increasing the volume of shredded pieces on the surface.

A substantial pile of shredded green vegetable, featuring thin pale strips with dark green skin edges, dominates the wooden cutting board. The camera focuses on the accumulated mound of ingredients, highlighting the texture and volume created by the grating process.

The static shot maintains focus on a large mound of shredded green vegetable resting on the wooden cutting board. The pile comprises thin, pale strips with dark green skin edges, showing no significant movement or change in arrangement. The camera highlights the texture and volume of the prepared ingredient without new action.

A close-up view captures a hand gripping a large metal knife, actively slicing through several pale yellow garlic cloves arranged on a wooden cutting board. The blade presses down, creating small, irregular white chunks that scatter near the foreground while whole cloves remain in the background.

A metal knife with visible indentations continues slicing through pale garlic cloves on a wooden cutting board. Fingers stabilize the ingredients as the blade creates thin, white segments, adding to the small pile of minced pieces in the foreground. The camera maintains a close-up view of the cutting action.

A hand drops clumps of fluffy, cooked white rice into the glass bowl atop the existing mixture of mashed beans, sautéed vegetables, spices, and rolled oats. Subsequently, a hand uses a silver utensil to vigorously mix the ingredients, incorporating the white rice into the dark bean paste and colorful vegetable blend.

A hand places clumps of white rice into the bowl, then uses a silver fork to vigorously mix the rice with the mashed beans, vegetables, and oats. The ingredients are stirred together, forming a cohesive, chunky, and textured mass within the clear glass container.

A hand manually mixes the combined ingredients of mashed beans, sautéed vegetables, oats, and white rice inside a clear glass bowl. The fingers press and fold the sticky, textured mass to blend everything together, while a silver fork rests at the bottom of the container.

A hand gathers a large portion of the textured mixture, comprising beans, rice, oats, and diced vegetables, from the glass bowl. The fingers press and compact the clump together, shaping it into a rough ball, while a silver fork remains submerged in the remaining ingredients at the bottom of the container.

A hand holds a formed, round ball of the mixture, showcasing the texture of dark beans, white rice, oats, and red peppers. The fingers gently compress the patty above the glass bowl, where the remaining ingredients and a silver fork rest. The ball appears cohesive and thick.

compressed_segments.text: [0-2] A logo animation on a black background resolves from distorted text to 'sarah's' in white sans-serif font above a horizontal line and 'vegan kitchen' in a thin outlined typeface below. [2-6] A static close-up displays a burger on a white plate with a dark rim, featuring a brown bun topped with sesame and poppy seeds, a dark patty, a slice of yellow cheese, and a large piece of pale green lettuce on a textured brown surface. [6-8] The scene cuts to a close-up of chopped raw ingredients piled together: diced red bell peppers on the left, minced garlic in the upper center, chopped green celery at the bottom, and diced white onions on the right. [8-14] On a wooden cutting board, a knife blade dices green celery into small cubes while a hand holds the stalks steady. [14-16] The view changes to slicing red bell peppers, where a hand holds a strip steady while a large knife cuts through it lengthwise on the wood surface. [16-24] A hand stabilizes strips of red bell pepper on a wooden cutting board as a large, rectangular knife blade slices through them lengthwise. The blade moves rapidly to chop the vegetable into small,

[62-64] A metal measuring cup filled with dry, pale beige rolled oats is presented on a wooden cutting board. [64-72] The view shifts to a clear glass bowl filled with dark red kidney beans; the camera maintains a steady close-up, slowly zooming in on the shiny, smooth legumes piled high on the surface. [72-76] The shot changes to a mound of cooked white rice, where fluffy, bright white grains fill the frame, highlighting the soft texture of the prepared starch.

[76-86] A dark frying pan contains a mixture of diced green zucchini, red bell peppers, and white onions being sautéed. The vegetables appear soft and glistening. A red spatula stirs the ingredients, pushing them across the pan. A silver utensil appears on the left to assist in mixing the cooked vegetable pile. [86-92] The scene shifts to a clear glass bowl on a beige textured mat filled with cooked dark red beans. A hand uses a silver fork to vigorously mash the shiny legumes. The utensil crushes the beans from whole shapes into a rough, chunky paste of skins and soft interiors.

From 92s to 96s, a hand uses a silver fork to mash dark red beans into a chunky paste inside a clear glass bowl. Between 96s and 102s, a red spatula transfers a sautéed mixture of diced green zucchini, red peppers, and white onions from a black pan into the bowl. At 102s, a fine bright red spice powder is sprinkled over the combined ingredients. The video then shows close-ups of spice jars: first, a jar labeled "TRADER JOE'S Spices of the World Smoked Paprika" (104s-106s), followed by a jar labeled "TRADER JOE'S PRODUCT OF VIETNAM BLACK PEPPERCORNS WITH GRINDER" (106s-108s).

[108-110] A hand grinds a "TRADER JOE'S" "BLACK PEPPERCORNS" container ("PRODUCT OF VIETNAM", "WITH GRINDER", "NET WT. 1.8 OZ (51g)") over a glass bowl holding mashed dark beans, sautéed diced vegetables, and red spice powder, adding black specks. [110-114] A large volume of dry pale beige rolled oats is dumped on top, followed by clumps of fluffy cooked white rice. [114-118] A silver utensil vigorously mixes the rice, oats, spices, and bean mixture, then hands manually fold the sticky, textured mass to blend ingredients. [118-122] A hand gathers a large portion of the chunky mix, pressing and compacting it into a cohesive round ball/patty that displays dark beans, white rice, oats, and red peppers.

recent_thinks.text: A hand holds a shaped portion of the mixture, compressing the dark beans, white rice, and red vegetables together. The textured mass is positioned above the glass bowl, which contains the remaining ingredients and a silver fork. The fingers press against the sides to maintain the cohesive form of the ingredient ball.

[6-8] The scene cuts to a close-up of chopped raw ingredients piled together: diced red bell peppers on the left, minced garlic in the upper center, chopped green celery at the bottom, and diced white onions on the right. [8-14] On a wooden cutting board, a knife blade dices green celery into small cubes while a hand holds the stalks steady. [14-16] The view changes to slicing red bell peppers, where a hand holds a strip steady while a large knife cuts through it lengthwise on the wood surface. [16-24] A hand stabilizes strips of red bell pepper on a wooden cutting board as a large, rectangular knife blade slices through them lengthwise. The blade moves rapidly to chop the vegetable into small,

[76-86] A dark frying pan contains a mixture of diced green zucchini, red bell peppers, and white onions being sautéed. The vegetables appear soft and glistening. A red spatula stirs the ingredients, pushing them across the pan. A silver utensil appears on the left to assist in mixing the cooked vegetable pile. [86-92] The scene shifts to a clear glass bowl on a beige textured mat filled with cooked dark red beans. A hand uses a silver fork to vigorously mash the shiny legumes. The utensil crushes the beans from whole shapes into a rough, chunky paste of skins and soft interiors.

From 92s to 96s, a hand uses a silver fork to mash dark red beans into a chunky paste inside a clear glass bowl. Between 96s and 102s, a red spatula transfers a sautéed mixture of diced green zucchini, red peppers, and white onions from a black pan into the bowl. At 102s, a fine bright red spice powder is sprinkled over the combined ingredients. The video then shows close-ups of spice jars: first, a jar labeled "TRADER JOE'S Spices of the World Smoked Paprika" (104s-106s), followed by a jar labeled "TRADER JOE'S PRODUCT OF VIETNAM BLACK PEPPERCORNS WITH GRINDER" (106s-108s).

[108-110] A hand grinds a "TRADER JOE'S" "BLACK PEPPERCORNS" container ("PRODUCT OF VIETNAM", "WITH GRINDER", "NET WT. 1.8 OZ (51g)") over a glass bowl holding mashed dark beans, sautéed diced vegetables, and red spice powder, adding black specks. [110-114] A large volume of dry pale beige rolled oats is dumped on top, followed by clumps of fluffy cooked white rice. [114-118] A silver utensil vigorously mixes the rice, oats, spices, and bean mixture, then hands manually fold the sticky, textured mass to blend ingredients. [118-122] A hand gathers a large portion of the chunky mix, pressing and compacting it into a cohesive round ball/patty that displays dark beans, white rice, oats, and red peppers.

[122-124] A hand compresses a mixture of dark beans, white rice, and red vegetables into a cohesive ball above a glass bowl containing remaining ingredients and a silver fork. [124-126] The view shifts to a beige silicone baking mat with a red border on a metal sheet, displaying vertical text "SILPAT Made in France". [126-136] A metal scoop deposits four separate portions of the chunky bean, rice, and vegetable blend onto the textured surface: the first mound is placed near the top edge, the second to the left of the first, the third on the bottom right, and the fourth on the bottom left area. [136-138] Four distinct mounds of the textured food mixture rest arranged across the mat.

recent_thinks.text: Four textured mounds of the bean, rice, and vegetable mixture sit on the beige silicone baking mat. A small, solitary dark crumb of the food blend appears in the central empty space between the patties, resting on the textured surface where the mat was previously clear.

A hand enters from the top left, placing fingers onto the upper-left mound of the bean and rice mixture. The palm presses down firmly, flattening the textured patty against the beige silicone mat. The other three mounds remain stationary in their original positions on the baking sheet.

A hand presses down firmly on the top-left mound of the bean and rice mixture, flattening it into a patty shape against the beige silicone baking mat. The fingers spread across the textured surface of the food to compress it, while the other three mounds remain untouched in their original positions on the sheet.

A hand presses down on the top-left mound of the bean and rice mixture, flattening it into a patty shape on the beige silicone mat. The fingers spread to compress the ingredients, while the other three mounds remain untouched in their positions.

A hand finishes pressing the top-left mound flat against the beige silicone mat. The hand then shifts to the top-right mound, placing fingers on top and beginning to compress that portion of the mixture into a flat patty shape, leaving the bottom mounds undisturbed.

A hand presses down on the upper-right mound of the textured bean and rice mixture, flattening it into a patty. The upper-left mound is already flattened nearby, while the two lower mounds remain in their original round shapes on the beige mat.

[6-8] The scene cuts to a close-up of chopped raw ingredients piled together: diced red bell peppers on the left, minced garlic in the upper center, chopped green celery at the bottom, and diced white onions on the right. [8-14] On a wooden cutting board, a knife blade dices green celery into small cubes while a hand holds the stalks steady. [14-16] The view changes to slicing red bell peppers, where a hand holds a strip steady while a large knife cuts through it lengthwise on the wood surface. [16-24] A hand stabilizes strips of red bell pepper on a wooden cutting board as a large, rectangular knife blade slices through them lengthwise. The blade moves rapidly to chop the vegetable into small,

[108-110] A hand grinds a "TRADER JOE'S" "BLACK PEPPERCORNS" container ("PRODUCT OF VIETNAM", "WITH GRINDER", "NET WT. 1.8 OZ (51g)") over a glass bowl holding mashed dark beans, sautéed diced vegetables, and red spice powder, adding black specks. [110-114] A large volume of dry pale beige rolled oats is dumped on top, followed by clumps of fluffy cooked white rice. [114-118] A silver utensil vigorously mixes the rice, oats, spices, and bean mixture, then hands manually fold the sticky, textured mass to blend ingredients. [118-122] A hand gathers a large portion of the chunky mix, pressing and compacting it into a cohesive round ball/patty that displays dark beans, white rice, oats, and red peppers.

[122-124] A hand compresses a mixture of dark beans, white rice, and red vegetables into a cohesive ball above a glass bowl containing remaining ingredients and a silver fork. [124-126] The view shifts to a beige silicone baking mat with a red border on a metal sheet, displaying vertical text "SILPAT Made in France". [126-136] A metal scoop deposits four separate portions of the chunky bean, rice, and vegetable blend onto the textured surface: the first mound is placed near the top edge, the second to the left of the first, the third on the bottom right, and the fourth on the bottom left area. [136-138] Four distinct mounds of the textured food mixture rest arranged across the mat.

[138-140] Four textured mounds of bean, rice, and vegetable mixture sit on a beige silicone baking mat with a small crumb in the center. [140-148] A hand presses down on the upper-left mound, flattening it into a patty. [148-154] The hand moves to the upper-right mound, compressing it into a flat patty, while the two lower mounds remain round and untouched.

A hand presses and shapes mounds of textured bean and rice mixture on a beige silicone mat with red borders. Initially, the hand flattens the upper-right mound into a patty while an upper-left patty sits nearby and two lower mounds remain round. The focus shifts to the upper-left mound; the hand presses it with spread fingers, smoothing the edges to form a flat disc. The fingers ensure even thickness on the surface. Throughout, the upper-right patty remains flat, and the two lower mounds stay round and untouched.

recent_thinks.text: A hand presses down on the upper-left mound of the bean and rice mixture, flattening it into a patty on the beige silicone mat. The upper-right patty is already shaped, while the two lower mounds remain round. Fingers smooth the surface to ensure even thickness.
Scene continues without notable changes.

A clear glass bowl filled with pale green iceberg lettuce leaves sits on a surface. To the left, a bottle of Annie's Naturals Organic Ketchup with a red label and tomato graphic is partially visible. The scene highlights the fresh, crisp texture of the lettuce leaves under bright lighting.

A white plate with a thin black rim holds five thick slices of ripe red tomato, arranged in a slightly overlapping cluster. The juicy interior and seeds are clearly visible on the red flesh. In the upper left corner, a jar of yellow pickles is partially visible, and green cucumber slices appear in the bottom right corner on a dark textured placemat.

A white plate with a black rim holds thin slices of red onion arranged in overlapping layers, showing purple and white rings. To the right, a partial view of another plate reveals round slices of green cucumber. The items rest on a dark, textured brown woven placemat.
